//: TS config (A61/A30). Base config: `tsc -p tsconfig.json` type-checks the pure-logic core (src/lib/**, native .ts, STRICT). The Svelte SPA (src/app/**: App.svelte + components + main.ts + lib/*.ts) and the marketing/info site (src/site/**) are checked by svelte-check (tsconfig.svelte.json) instead, because plain tsc can't resolve .svelte imports (main.ts imports App.svelte). allowJs/checkJs are gone — A69 finished the site→Svelte conversion, so there is no hand-written .js under src/ left to allow.
//include: Pure-logic core only (src/lib/core + utils). The shadcn-svelte UI under src/lib/components is .svelte + .ts barrels that import .svelte — plain tsc can't resolve those, so svelte-check (tsconfig.svelte.json) owns it.
